summary: Focana 2.4.2 keeps wake-up resume prompts and update Settings in sync with what the app already knows.
fixes: Wake and login resume prompts now keep showing Ready to resume when saved work is available, instead of falling back to What's next on repeated wake.
Settings now keeps a downloaded update in the ready-to-install state even if a later update check reports an error.
Settings update copy now labels the update channel clearly instead of making the current version sound like the newest published release.
